action_set_definitions.name: get_satellite_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of SV-42, including altitude, Argument of Latitude (AoL), fuel mass, battery level, and operational status.

action_set_definitions.name: compute_orbital_maneuver_physics
action_set_definitions.description: Calculates the physical parameters required for a transition between two altitudes, including the required delta-v, duration of the burn, the mean motion (orbital angular velocity), and the phasing drift rate.

action_set_definitions.name: perform_propulsion_burn
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a thruster burn to change the satellite's velocity. This action is prohibited if the battery level is below 85%.

delta_v_kms.description: Change in velocity (positive for prograde, negative for retrograde).

action_set_definitions.name: orbit_coast_and_recharge
action_set_definitions.description: Simulates time passing as the satellite coasts in its current orbit, allowing for passive AoL drift and battery recharging via solar panels.

action_set_definitions.name: set_satellite_mode
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the satellite's operational status mode.

state_description.altitude_km: Current orbital altitude above mean sea level in kilometers.
state_description.velocity_kms: Current orbital velocity in kilometers per second.
state_description.inclination_deg: Orbital inclination relative to the equatorial plane in degrees.
state_description.battery_level_pct: Current battery charge level as a percentage (0-100).
state_description.status: Current operational mode of the satellite (e.g., nominal, safe_mode, maneuvering).
state_description.epoch_timestamp: The simulation time in ISO 8601 format.
